name: cgb-builder
description: Analyses TypeScript, Python, Rust, and 8 other languages to produce a queryable code graph. Provides tools for dependency analysis, impact estimation, architecture exploration, refactoring assistance, and AI context bundles.
author: cgb-builder contributors
install_instructions: Run `npm install -g cgb-builder` then `cgb init` in your project root to build the graph, then `cgb install claude` to register this plugin.

tools.name: cgb_init
tools.description: Scan a project directory and build (or refresh) the code graph.

tools.name: cgb_bundle
tools.description: Generate an AI-optimised context bundle for a file including its dependencies.

tools.name: cgb_deps
tools.description: Get all dependencies (imports) of a file.

tools.name: cgb_impact
tools.description: Find files affected if a given file changes.

tools.name: cgb_path
tools.description: Shortest dependency path between two files.

tools.name: cgb_search
tools.description: Full-text search over node names and file paths.

tools.name: cgb_stats
tools.description: Graph statistics: files, nodes, edges, cycles, orphans.

tools.name: cgb_review_context
tools.description: Generate review context for a set of changed files.

tools.name: cgb_detect_changes
tools.description: Detect changed files vs git HEAD and return risk scores.

tools.name: cgb_entry_points
tools.description: List all entry points detected in the graph.

tools.name: cgb_trace_flow
tools.description: Trace the call chain from a given entry point.

tools.name: cgb_critical_nodes
tools.description: Return the highest-criticality nodes in the graph.

tools.name: cgb_communities
tools.description: Detect architectural communities / clusters of files.

tools.name: cgb_architecture_overview
tools.description: Single-paragraph architecture overview derived from communities.

tools.name: cgb_large_functions
tools.description: Find functions/methods exceeding a configurable line threshold.

tools.name: cgb_dead_code
tools.description: Find exported symbols with no internal callers.

tools.name: cgb_refactor_suggestions
tools.description: Return prioritised refactoring opportunities.

tools.name: cgb_generate_wiki
tools.description: Generate Markdown wiki pages from graph communities.

tools.name: cgb_wiki_page
tools.description: Get a single Markdown wiki page for a file.

tools.name: cgb_registry_list
tools.description: List all repos registered in the global multi-repo registry.

tools.name: cgb_registry_search
tools.description: Search nodes across all registered repos.

tools.name: cgb_embed_search
tools.description: Semantic similarity search using TF-IDF embeddings.

tools.name: cgb_embed_similar
tools.description: Find files/nodes similar to a given file using TF-IDF embeddings.

prompts.name: review_changes
prompts.description: Review staged changes with full impact context.

prompts.name: architecture_map
prompts.description: Summarise the project architecture using the code graph.

prompts.name: debug_issue
prompts.description: Debug an issue with code graph context loaded.

prompts.name: onboard_developer
prompts.description: Generate an onboarding guide for a new developer.

prompts.name: pre_merge_check
prompts.description: Run a pre-merge safety check across changed files.
